name: Blue Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup AM Barley Flour or any flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients: blue cornmeal, barley flour (or any flour), baking powder, and sea salt (if using).
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together honey (or maple syrup) and egg (beaten or replaced with an egg replacer).
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan or muffin tins.
5. Bake at 425°F for 15-20 minutes, or until the top and sides are golden brown.
6. This recipe yields 6 large muffins or one 8-inch square pan of cornbread.
